things.name: Cu Chi Tunnels
things.description: Extraordinary 250-km underground wartime network used by Viet Cong — crawl through actual tunnels

things.name: War Remnants Museum
things.description: Powerful and sobering museum documenting the Vietnam War from a Vietnamese perspective

things.name: Ben Thanh Market
things.description: Saigon's most iconic market with stalls of Vietnamese food, silk, lacquerware and souvenirs

things.name: Reunification Palace
things.description: The former South Vietnamese presidential palace where tanks crashed through the gates in April 1975

things.name: Notre-Dame Cathedral & Central Post Office
things.description: Twin red-brick French colonial icons from the 1880s in the heart of District 1

things.name: Mekong Delta Day Trip
things.description: Boat through the waterways of the rice basket of Vietnam — floating markets, coconut factories and village life

things.name: Pho & Banh Mi Food Trail
things.description: Eat your way through District 1 — pho bo at dawn, banh mi at lunch and bun bo hue for dinner

things.name: Fine Arts Museum
things.description: Beautiful 1929 French colonial building housing Vietnamese art from the pre-Doi Moi era to today

things.name: Rooftop Bar at Bitexco Tower
things.description: Helipad-topped skyscraper with the Chill Sky Bar on the 26th floor — panoramic Saigon River views

things.name: Jade Emperor Pagoda
things.description: Taoist temple (1909) with extraordinary carved wooden figures — possibly the most atmospheric temple in Vietnam
